prompt: Elegant premium game main-menu background for a Gomoku (Five in a Row) app. Warm dark walnut wood tones with deep amber and charcoal gradient, a beautiful blurred wooden Go board with faint grid lines and a few glossy black and white Go stones receding in the lower third, soft golden bokeh light, cinematic depth of field, luxurious mobile game splash art, no text, no letters, clean uncluttered center for a title.

Elegant premium game main-menu background for a Chinese Chess (Xiangqi) app. Deep crimson and dark rosewood gradient with subtle oriental ink-wash texture, a faint blurred wooden xiangqi board with river and palace lines receding in the lower third, a few round engraved red and black chess discs softly out of focus, warm golden rim light and gentle bokeh, cinematic, luxurious, no text, no letters, clean uncluttered center for a title.
